title: AWS SCP Guardrail Reasoning
summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how AWS Service Control Policies define organization-level maximum permissions without granting access by themselves.
objectives: Explain what a Service Control Policy is
Differentiate SCPs from identity policies and permission boundaries
Explain why SCPs do not grant permissions by themselves
Understand how SCPs affect accounts and organizational units
Prepare for Principal LABs involving cross-account trust, PassRole, and role chaining
